profile: Full Stack Developer with over 5 years of experience in TypeScript-based web development, cloud infrastructure, and AI/LLM integration for enterprise SaaS products. Delivered 10+ production applications using React, Next.js, and Node.js with reliable uptime across AWS-hosted environments. Integrated multiple AI and voice synthesis APIs (OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Perplexity, Gemini) into customer-facing products powering multimedia generation and conversational AI features. Built asset processing pipelines with automated optimization that reduced storage costs by 25%. Designed and deployed agentic AI workflows with MCP integration, streamlining manual business processes for B2B clients. Consistently delivered features on or ahead of schedule through reusable architecture patterns and CI/CD automation.

projects.name: MakeMovie.ai – AI Multimedia Studio
projects.description: Full creative dashboard for generating AI-powered images, videos, avatars, fashion edits, and chat-assisted workflows from text prompts.
features: Built the full-stack creative platform integrating Flux 1.1, Kling v2.0, and HeyGen APIs for multimedia generation
Developed the chat-assisted workflow engine with Perplexity API for intelligent creative prompt building
Implemented real-time generation progress tracking with WebSocket-based status updates
Designed the media asset management system with cloud storage and CDN delivery

projects.name: Outbound Voice Agents – Lead Calling System
projects.description: Automated outbound calling system that dials leads from CSV uploads, follows scripted flows, and logs call outcomes in a dashboard.
features: Built the end-to-end calling platform from CSV upload interface to real-time call monitoring dashboard
Integrated Twilio VoIP and ElevenLabs voice synthesis for natural AI-powered outbound conversations
Developed the scripted flow engine for dynamic call branching based on lead responses
Implemented the analytics dashboard for tracking call outcomes, conversion rates, and campaign performance

projects.name: Tales of You – Personalized Storybook Generator
projects.description: AI storytelling platform turning selfies and prompts into personalized children's storybooks with custom characters, narration, and interactive flipbook reading.
features: Built the full-stack application with Next.js frontend and Node.js backend for story generation workflows
Integrated Google Gemini 2.5 for narrative generation and Nano Banana for custom character illustrations
Implemented Stripe payment processing for premium storybook purchases and subscriptions
Designed the AWS infrastructure (S3, CloudFront, EC2) for media storage and global content delivery
